markdown:
#  User Guide Procore Connect For Drawings 
Table of Contents 
##  Set Connection Approval Preference 
  1. Navigate to the Company level **Admin** tool.
  2. Under 'Tool Settings,' click **Connection Manager**.
  3. Do one of the following:
    1. To automatically approve connections, mark the checkbox to 'Allow users with existing access to the Drawings tool to connect their project without Admin approval. (Recommended)'.
    2. Clear the checkmark to require a connection request be sent for review before manually accepting or rejecting a project's request to connect.
  4. Click **Save**.


[ ](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/user-guide-procore-connect-for-drawings/permissions/)
[ Approve or Reject Connections (if review is required) ](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/user-guide-procore-connect-for-drawings/approve-or-reject-connections-if-review-is-required/)
title: User Guide Procore Connect For Drawings - Set Connection Approval Preference
